title: Relaciones y convivencia · People and feelings
focus: B1 words for friendships, family, apologies, conflict, trust and everyday social life.

words.example: Cuando hablo sobre la amistad, intento añadir un detalle concreto.
words.example_en: When I talk about the friendship, I try to add a concrete detail.
